title: SMP Cell Definition Schema
description: Comprehensive schema for SMP (Seed + Model + Prompt) Cell - a locked static program combining deterministic initial state, AI model configuration, and prompt templates

id.description: Unique identifier for the SMP cell

version.description: Semantic version of the SMP cell definition

extensions.description: Optional extension fields for custom functionality

Seed.description: Initial state/deterministic starting point that ensures reproducibility

value.description: The actual seed value - deterministic starting point

entropy.description: Entropy measure for randomness control (0=deterministic, 1=max entropy)

derivationPath.description: Optional derivation path for hierarchical seed generation

salt.description: Optional salt for additional variation control

Model.description: AI model configuration including provider, model name, and inference parameters

modelId.description: Full qualified model ID including version

Prompt.description: Prompt template and variables that define the task

variables.description: Map of variable names to their definitions

status.description: Lock status: unlocked=editable, partial=some fields locked, locked=immutable, frozen=archived

Fingerprint.description: Cryptographic fingerprint for verification and integrity

role.description: The role the AI should assume

prompt.systemPrompt: You are a precise and thorough analyst. Always provide structured, well-reasoned outputs.

input.input: def add(a, b): return a + b

examples.output:
## Code Review

### Function: `add`
- **Purpose**: Adds two values
- **Parameters**: `a`, `b` (no type hints)
- **Suggestions**: Add type hints and docstring

```python
def add(a: int | float, b: int | float) -> int | float:
    """Add two numbers together."""
    return a + b
```

metadata.name: General Analysis Cell
metadata.description: A versatile SMP cell for various analysis tasks
metadata.author: SMP Architecture Team

prompt.systemPrompt: You are a data processing agent with strict adherence to specified constraints.

metadata.name: Data Processing Cell
metadata.description: SMP cell for structured data operations
